title: Hari Ke Hradaya Me Shiva
author: Anil Kurmi
description: I wrote this book to share the profound wisdom and transformative power of Lord Shiva with seekers on their spiritual journey. It is a humble offering to the divine, meant to inspire devotion, understanding, and inner awakening. May this book serve as a guide and companion for those who wish to explore the depths of Shiva's teachings and experience his grace in their lives.

title: The Essence of Shiva
author: Anil Kurmi
description: An introduction to Lord Shiva — the Supreme Consciousness, the cosmic dancer, and the destroyer of ignorance. Explore the symbolism, sacred mantras, and eternal wisdom of Mahadeva.
